KVK açıklaması

Graphic Design is the field where all visual products of communication are designed. The need for graphic design in new media and business areas of the developing age is increasing day by day. Graphic designer is the person who designs the visual problems of communication by investigating and questioning.

Graphic design; Includes topics such as emblem, logo, corporate identity, book, magazine, packaging, catalog, brochure, poster, environmental graphic designs, illustration, press flyer, interactive multimedia (web page design), animation, cinema and TV graphic. The four-year curriculum of the Department of Graphics has been prepared to educate the student in the issues mentioned above.

Applied studies in all areas of graphic design are carried out in computer laboratories (PC and MAC), photo studios and laboratories, printing and practice ateliers in our department. Training is provided by expert staff who have proven themselves in the profession at national and international level.

Assoc. Prof. Setenay SEZER

Head of Department
